items.title: Russian fighters confirm withdrawal from northern Mali city after separatist attacks
items.dek: Ethnic Tuareg fighters say they are in control of Kidal following a weekend of nationwide attacks, alongside Islamist groups.
items.body: Ethnic Tuareg fighters say they are in control of Kidal following a weekend of nationwide attacks, alongside Islamist groups.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Sri Lankan monks arrested after 110kg of cannabis discovered in their luggage
items.dek: Officials say each monk was found with around 5kg of Kush - a particularly potent form of the drug - hidden within "false walls" in their luggage.
items.body: Officials say each monk was found with around 5kg of Kush - a particularly potent form of the drug - hidden within "false walls" in their luggage.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Performer describes locking eyes with Trump as they ducked for cover during shooting
items.dek: Oz Pearlman says he thought they were "about to die" as he and the US president lay half-a-metre apart on the ground during the incident.
items.body: Oz Pearlman says he thought they were "about to die" as he and the US president lay half-a-metre apart on the ground during the incident.
items.author: IriLine Desk
